dataset: NOSH ChartingSystem - Synthea synthetic patient data

pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh database query targeting fri_c field
setup_nosh.sh line 184 defines fri_c as Friday closing time in practiceinfo table; setup_task.sh line 15 updates fri_c
Task description states 'Change the closing time for Friday to 1:00 PM (13:00)'; 13:00 in 24-hour format = 1:00 PM
SQL TIME format: 13:00:00 represents 1:00 PM in HH:MM:SS format; verified against export_result.sh parsing logic
setup_task.sh line 15 resets fri_c to '17:00' (5:00 PM); setup_nosh.sh line 184 also initializes fri_c='17:00'
setup_nosh.sh line 184 sets mon_c='17:00'; setup_task.sh line 15 verifies mon_c should remain '17:00'
setup_nosh.sh line 184 sets fri_o='08:00'; setup_task.sh line 15 and task description confirm fri_o should remain '08:00'

privileged_info_summary: The task 'update_operating_hours@1' modifies the NOSH ChartingSystem practice schedule database. The primary objective is to update the practiceinfo table's fri_c (Friday closing time) field from 17:00 (5:00 PM) to 13:00 (1:00 PM) to implement 'Summer Fridays' for Hillside Family Medicine (practice_id=1). The task includes precision requirements: Monday closing time (mon_c) must remain unchanged at 17:00, and Friday opening time (fri_o) must remain unchanged at 08:00. The verifier checks the database values in /tmp/task_result.json, expecting fri_close='13:00' or '13:00:00'. All data is synthetic: NOSH is a real open-source EHR system, but the practice and patient data are synthetically generated using Synthea for the Massachusetts cohort.
